status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/control/ca/gc/tbs-sct.json for the Directive on Automated Decision-Making this tool implements.

data.notes: Questionnaire-based scoring tool (survey of 60+ risk/mitigation questions) that determines an automated decision system's impact level (I-IV) under the Directive on Automated Decision-Making (secid:control/tbs-sct.canada.ca/directive-automated-decision-making), dictating required review, documentation, and human-oversight obligations.
